# Correctover

> The runtime security layer for the MCP ecosystem.

## About
Correctover is the official reference implementation of CCS (Runtime Security Conformance Standard for MCP). It provides real-time security verification for MCP servers and tools, blocking RCE, SSRF, and cloud credential hijacking with 22μs P50 latency.

## Capabilities
- **CCS Standard**: Open runtime security conformance standard for MCP
- **Runtime Verification**: Input/output validation for MCP tool calls
- **Fault Diagnosis**: Auto-classification of 215 fault modes across 19 CVE categories
- **Self-Healing**: 97.4% auto-recovery rate
- **Provider Failover**: Automatic switching on provider failures

## Installation
```bash
pip install correctover    # PyPI
npm install correctover    # NPM
```

## Key Metrics
- 215 fault modes | 19 CVEs | 97.4% self-healing | 22μs P50 latency
- 5,144+ monthly downloads (PyPI + NPM)

## Links
- Website: https://correctover.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Correctover
- Smithery: https://smithery.ai/servers/correctover/correctover
- White Paper: DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21405206

## Pricing
- Community: Free (open-source)
- CCS Audit: $299 compliance audit
- Enterprise: Custom
